title: Corpus Item
description: A single ingested corpus item (own-account or competitor). First-class manual-submission shape (spec §6.2). Every corpus item is trust-class-tagged at write time; scraped material — including the operator's own scraped corpus — enters as Zone-U untrusted-scraped (RD-8) and only an explicit operator attestation may promote a curated subset.

source.description: How this item entered the corpus.

captured_at.description: When this item was captured / observed.

author.description: Optional author identifier, minimized per the data-minimization posture (RD-9). Omit when not needed.

text.description: The item's textual content. As Zone-U input it is wrapped in the data fence before ever entering a prompt.

media_refs.description: Optional CONTENT_HOME-relative references to media attached to the item.

trust_class.description: Trust zone of the item (RD-8). untrusted-scraped is Zone U (the default for anything scraped or third-party); operator-curated is the promoted class and requires an attestation.

attestation.description: Operator attestation recording the U->S promotion. REQUIRED when trust_class is operator-curated; absent otherwise.

promoted_by.description: Identifier of the operator who promoted the item.

reason.description: Why the item was promoted to operator-curated.

retention_class.description: Retention/purge policy class for the item (RD-9). Drives corpus retention windows and purge scheduling.
